articles.title: Excited to see Open to Work from my colleagues Ryan and Aneesh out in the world. Ryan told me months ago he wanted to write a book to help people navigate this moment of profound change and thrive as AI reshapes how work gets done. I can’t think of two people better suited to write it. It’s a great guide for anyone trying to make sense of work right now.
